item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-08 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+14 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +14，前 3 日均值 4，加速度 3.5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist (+15 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A comprehensive, MCP-powered front-end quality checklist with 385 rules across 11 categories, designed for both human developers and AI agents. Why it matters: With 72,971 stars, a 24-hour star delta of 14, and a high acceleration of 2.2, this project is experiencing a sudden breakout in attention. The recent release and active commits (within 7 days) indicate ongoing development, making it a timely resource for developers adopting AI-assisted workflows. Developer insight: This signals a growing trend of turning static documentation into machine-consumable, agent-friendly formats. For AI developers, it demonstrates how to package domain knowledge (e.g., front-end rules) as MCP tools, enabling agents to perform structured, reliable code reviews without hallucination. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] milvus-io/milvus (+37 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Vector Database / Embedding Description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search Why it matters: Vector Database / Embedding 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +37，前 3 日均值 15.3，加速度 2.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] TencentCloud/CubeSandbox (+1517 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1517，前 3 日均值 184，加速度 8.2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+1975 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1975，前 3 日均值 683.7，加速度 2.9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1040 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1040，总 stars 35,388，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+985 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +985，总 stars 53,031，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+2051 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2051，总 stars 53,598，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] nexu-io/open-design (+587 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +587，前 3 日均值 286.3，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+730 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +730，总 stars 50,490，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
